Hello {{NAME}},

Thanks for reaching out. This is usually caused by one of these:

1. The app is not enabled as your message filter
This is the most common reason. On your iPhone, tap here to open the setup screen and follow the instructions. Alternatively, on your iPhone go to Settings → Apps → Messages → Unknown & Spam and select Simply Filter SMS. It should look like this:

Screenshot attached below.

2. The messages are iMessage, not SMS
iOS only filters SMS messages from unknown senders (green bubbles). Blue bubbles (iMessage) cannot be filtered by third-party apps.

3. The sender is saved in your contacts
iOS skips filtering entirely for any sender in your contacts, regardless of your filter settings.

4. Double-check your filters in the app
Tap here to open the Test Your Filters screen and paste the sender and message. If it shows as filtered but the real message still got through, let me know and we can dig into it.

If you're still stuck, send over a screenshot of your filters, the Settings screen showing the app is enabled, and a message that slipped through.

- Adi.
